feat.name: Behold My Creation!
feat.text: You have rebuilt your creation once more. It is greater now, more than it once was. Soon, it shall be greater still. Your construct companion becomes an incredible construct companion.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
